description: always-visible pinned doc card with copy bar
rolling-merge distiller: window capture, interpolate voice, call llm slot, persist distillate
typed-moment extraction riding the distill pass (commitment/question/decision/artifact); requires distill.enabled
entity extraction + recency×frequency index riding the distill pass; requires distill.enabled (Moment.refs linking also needs distill.moments)

speech-to-text pre-distill stage: base64 audio/* chunks are transcribed via the stt slot into utf8 text before the distill pass; requires distill.enabled (no persistence path for transcribed-but-undistilled text)
Act pass on session end: compose a follow-up draft from the session's distillates + moments (prepared, never sent); needs distillates to draft anything, so distill.enabled must have run

context-switch detection: focus signals (window title + repo path) feed the router, which auto-starts/switches sessions into the matched workspace when a candidate sustains dominance; attribution evidence stamped on every auto-started session
